name: insurance claims processors handling 50–100 claims/month tool
description: For insurance claims processors handling 50–100 claims/month, inefficient extraction causes delayed claim processing. We automate form extraction instead of manual data entry and formatting.
problem_solved: Inefficient extraction and formatting of insurance claim forms from scanned documents.
